narrative:
Center East/Sarahsville (precinct in Noble County) has 414 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
